Minds That Made Money

Sixteen legendary investors — how they think, and what a retail investor can actually use. Tap any card for the full deck. Review copy here.
01IN
Rakesh Jhunjhunwala
Held Titan through 2008 — never sold.
02US
Warren Buffett
Beat the market 60 years — by sitting still.
03IN
Dolly Khanna
Beat the funds where they won't look.
04US
Charlie Munger
Read more than he invested.
05IN
Radhakishan Damani
Bet on boring retail — and never blinked.
06US
Peter Lynch
Beat the pros by ignoring them.
07IN
Vijay Kedia
Picks stocks like he picks friends.
08US
Howard Marks
Reads the cycle — doesn't predict it.
09IN
Mohnish Pabrai
Cloned Buffett — and out-returned him.
10US
Benjamin Graham
Invented value investing.
11IN
Nemish Shah
Forty years, zero interviews.
12US
Ray Dalio
Got rich by proving himself wrong.
13IN
Samir Arora
Saw the India story before it was a story.
14US
John Templeton
Bought the panic — 1939, only 4 of 104 to zero.
15IN
Raamdeo Agrawal
Buy right, sit tight.
16US
Cathie Wood
Right thesis, wrong timing.
